recommendations.title: Charlotte Gray
recommendations.overview: This is a drama set in Nazi-occupied France at the height of World War II. Charlotte Gray tells the compelling story of a young Scottish woman working with the French Resistance in the hope of rescuing her lover, a missing RAF pilot. Based on the bes

recommendations.title: Resistance
recommendations.overview: The story of mime Marcel Marceau as he works with a group of Jewish boy scouts and the French Resistance to save the lives of ten thousand orphans during World War II.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: Lion of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Resistance leader Omar Mukhtar opposes Italian colonization before World War II. The brutal guerrilla war against Italian General Rodolfo Graziani and the Fascist forces of Benito Mussolini highlights the struggle for Libyan independence and the hars

recommendations.title: My Best Friend Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: Based on the real-life friendship between Anne Frank and Hannah Goslar, from Nazi-occupied Amsterdam to their harrowing reunion in a concentration camp.

recommendations.title: The Resistance Banker
recommendations.overview: In the occupied Netherlands during World War II, banker Walraven van Hall is asked to use his financial contacts to help the Dutch resistance. With his brother Gijs, he comes up with a risky plan to take out huge loans and use the money to finance th

recommendations.title: The Forgotten Battle
recommendations.overview: During WWII's crucial Battle of the Scheldt, the lives of a glider pilot, a Nazi soldier and a reluctant Resistance recruit tragically intersect.

recommendations.title: Karol: A Man Who Became Pope
recommendations.overview: The life of the pope John-Paul II, from his youth as a writer, actor, and athlete in war-torn occupied Poland to his election as Pope at the age of 58.

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.
